# 4. Consider a recurrence relation: a0=−2,a_0=-2,a0​=−2, a1=2a_1=2a1​=2 and an=4an−1−4an−2.a_n=4a_{n-1}-4a_{n-2}.an​=4an−1​−4an−2​.

# a) Use characteristic equation to solve it.

# solution：solution：solution： C1=4,C_1=4,C1​=4, C2=−4.C_2=-4.C2​=−4. CharacteristicCharacteristicCharacteristic equationequationequation isisis r2−4⋅r+4=0.r^2-4 \cdot r+4=0.r2−4⋅r+4=0. ⇒\Rightarrow⇒ (r−2)2=0(r-2)^2=0(r−2)2=0 ⇒\Rightarrow⇒ an=α1⋅n0⋅2n+α2⋅n1⋅2n.a_n=\alpha_1\cdot n^0\cdot2^n+ \alpha_2\cdot n^1\cdot2^n.an​=α1​⋅n0⋅2n+α2​⋅n1⋅2n. ThenThenThen a0=−2a_0=-2a0​=−2 ⇒\Rightarrow⇒ −2=α1⋅00⋅20+α2⋅01⋅20-2=\alpha_1\cdot 0^0\cdot2^0+ \alpha_2\cdot 0^1\cdot2^0−2=α1​⋅00⋅20+α2​⋅01⋅20 andandand a1=2a_1=2a1​=2 ⇒\Rightarrow⇒ 2=α1⋅10⋅21+α2⋅11⋅212=\alpha_1\cdot 1^0\cdot2^1+ \alpha_2\cdot 1^1\cdot2^12=α1​⋅10⋅21+α2​⋅11⋅21 ⇒\Rightarrow⇒ α1=−2.\alpha_1=-2.α1​=−2. α2=3.\alpha_2=3.α2​=3. Answer=Answer=Answer=an=−2⋅2n+3n⋅2n=a_n=-2\cdot2^n+3 n\cdot2^n=an​=−2⋅2n+3n⋅2n= (−2+3n)⋅2n(-2+3n)\cdot2^n(−2+3n)⋅2n

# Note:Note:Note: CharacteristicCharacteristicCharacteristic equation:equation :equation: rn=C1rn−1+C2rn−1+...+Ckrn−k,r^n=C_1r^{n-1}+C_2r^{n-1}+...+C_kr^{n-k},rn=C1​rn−1+C2​rn−1+...+Ck​rn−k, whenwhenwhen an=C1⋅an−1+C2⋅an−2+...+Ckan−k.a_n=C_1\cdot a_{n-1}+C_2\cdot a_{n-2}+...+C_ka_{n-k}.an​=C1​⋅an−1​+C2​⋅an−2​+...+Ck​an−k​.

# b) Use generating function to solve it.

# solution：solution：solution： ∑n≥2∞gnZn=4∑n≥2∞gn−1Zn\sum_{n≥2}^{∞}g_nZ^n=4\sum_{n≥2}^{∞}g_{n-1}Z^n∑n≥2∞​gn​Zn=4∑n≥2∞​gn−1​Zn−4-4−4∑n≥2∞gn−2Zn\sum_{n≥2}^{∞}g_{n-2}Z^n∑n≥2∞​gn−2​Zn ⇒\Rightarrow⇒ ∑n≥0∞gnZn=4∑n≥2∞gn−1Zn\sum_{n≥0}^{∞}g_nZ^n=4\sum_{n≥2}^{∞}g_{n-1}Z^n∑n≥0∞​gn​Zn=4∑n≥2∞​gn−1​Zn−4-4−4∑n≥2∞gn−2Zn+(−2)+2Z\sum_{n≥2}^{∞}g_{n-2}Z^n+(-2)+2Z∑n≥2∞​gn−2​Zn+(−2)+2Z ⇒\Rightarrow⇒ G(Z)G(Z)G(Z)=4Z∑n≥2∞gn−1Zn−14Z\sum_{n≥2}^{∞}g_{n-1}Z^{n-1}4Z∑n≥2∞​gn−1​Zn−1−4Z2-4Z^2−4Z2∑n≥2∞gn−2Zn−2+(−2)+2Z\sum_{n≥2}^{∞}g_{n-2}Z^{n-2}+(-2)+2Z∑n≥2∞​gn−2​Zn−2+(−2)+2Z ⇒\Rightarrow⇒ G(Z)=4Z[G(Z)−(−2)]−4Z2G(Z)+(−2)+2ZG(Z)=4Z[G(Z)-(-2)]-4Z^2G(Z)+(-2)+2ZG(Z)=4Z[G(Z)−(−2)]−4Z2G(Z)+(−2)+2Z ⇒\Rightarrow⇒ G(Z)=−2+10Z1−4Z+4Z2G(Z)=\dfrac{-2+10Z}{1-4Z+4Z^2}G(Z)=1−4Z+4Z2−2+10Z​ ⇒\Rightarrow⇒ G(Z)=−2(1−2Z)2+10Z(1−2Z)2G(Z)=\dfrac{-2}{(1-2Z)^2}+\dfrac{10Z}{(1-2Z)^2}G(Z)=(1−2Z)2−2​+(1−2Z)210Z​ ⇒\Rightarrow⇒ BecauseBecauseBecause 1(1−2Z)2=\dfrac{1}{(1-2Z)^2}=(1−2Z)21​= ∑n≥0∞(n+1n)2n⋅Zn=∑n≥0∞(n+1)⋅2n⋅Zn.\sum_{n≥0}^{∞}\left(\begin{array}{cc}n+1\\n\\\end{array}\right)2^n \cdot Z^n=\sum_{n≥0}^{∞}(n+1)\cdot 2^n \cdot Z^n.∑n≥0∞​(n+1n​)2n⋅Zn=∑n≥0∞​(n+1)⋅2n⋅Zn. SoSoSo G(Z)=−2∑n≥0∞(n+1)⋅2n⋅ZnG(Z)=-2\sum_{n≥0}^{∞}(n+1)\cdot 2^n \cdot Z^nG(Z)=−2∑n≥0∞​(n+1)⋅2n⋅Zn+10∑n≥1∞n⋅2n−1⋅Zn,+10\sum_{n≥1}^{∞}n\cdot 2^{n-1} \cdot Z^{n},+10∑n≥1∞​n⋅2n−1⋅Zn, So,So,So, an=−2(n+1)2n+10n⋅2n−1=−2(n+1)2n+5n⋅2n=(3n−2)⋅2n,a_n=-2(n+1)2^n+10n\cdot 2^{n-1}=-2(n+1)2^n+5n\cdot 2^n=(3n-2)\cdot 2^n,an​=−2(n+1)2n+10n⋅2n−1=−2(n+1)2n+5n⋅2n=(3n−2)⋅2n, n≥1.n\ge1.n≥1.

#

# c) Use generating function to solve the recurrence relation with initial conditions a0=1a_0=1a0​=1 and a1=2.a_1=2.a1​=2.

# solution：solution：solution： C1=4,C_1=4,C1​=4, C2=−4.C_2=-4.C2​=−4. CharacteristicCharacteristicCharacteristic equationequationequation isisis r2−4⋅r+4=0.r^2-4 \cdot r+4=0.r2−4⋅r+4=0. ⇒\Rightarrow⇒ (r−2)2=0(r-2)^2=0(r−2)2=0 ⇒\Rightarrow⇒ an=α1⋅n0⋅2n+α2⋅n1⋅2n.a_n=\alpha_1\cdot n^0\cdot2^n+ \alpha_2\cdot n^1\cdot2^n.an​=α1​⋅n0⋅2n+α2​⋅n1⋅2n. ThenThenThen a0=1a_0=1a0​=1 ⇒\Rightarrow⇒ 1=α1⋅00⋅20+α2⋅01⋅201=\alpha_1\cdot 0^0\cdot2^0+ \alpha_2\cdot 0^1\cdot2^01=α1​⋅00⋅20+α2​⋅01⋅20 andandand a1=2a_1=2a1​=2 ⇒\Rightarrow⇒ 2=α1⋅10⋅21+α2⋅11⋅212=\alpha_1\cdot 1^0\cdot2^1+ \alpha_2\cdot 1^1\cdot2^12=α1​⋅10⋅21+α2​⋅11⋅21 ⇒\Rightarrow⇒ α1=1.\alpha_1=1.α1​=1. α2=0.\alpha_2=0.α2​=0. Answer=Answer=Answer=an=1⋅2n+0n⋅2n=a_n=1\cdot2^n+0n\cdot2^n=an​=1⋅2n+0n⋅2n= 2n2^n2n

# 5. Consider the following recursive procedure A. We will use the following assumptions: Suppose A and B are both procedures. B take m\sqrt{m}m​ steps to compute, where m is the size of input.

# Procedure A(A(A(i1,i_1,i1​,i2,...,ini_2,...,i_ni2​,...,in​)))

# 1. if (n≤2)(n ≤ 2)(n≤2) then {\{{output = i1i_1i1​; return;}\}}

# 2. else {A(i1,i2,...,i⌊n/2⌋);\{A(i_1, i_2,...,i_{⌊n/2⌋});{A(i1​,i2​,...,i⌊n/2⌋​);

# 3.   A(i⌈n/2⌉,i⌈n/2⌉+1,...,in);A(i_{⌈n/2⌉},i_{⌈n/2⌉+1},...,i_n);A(i⌈n/2⌉​,i⌈n/2⌉+1​,...,in​);

# 4.   B(i1,i2,...,i⌈n⌉);}B(i_1,i_2,...,i_{⌈\sqrt{n}⌉});\}B(i1​,i2​,...,i⌈n​⌉​);}

# 5. return

# a) Derive recurrence relation to define the number of steps that procedure A takes to compute. Use an to denote # of steps when input size is n.

# solution:solution:solution:

我們要分析遞迴程序 AAA 的步驟數，並推導出該程序的時間複雜度。程序描述如下：

1.1.1. 當輸入大小 n≤2n\le 2n≤2 時，直接輸出結果並返回，步驟數為常數
2.2.2. 當 n>2n > 2n>2 時：
呼叫AAA 對前半部分數據進行遞迴運算，輸入大小為 ⌊\lfloor⌊n/2n/2n/2⌋\rfloor⌋
呼叫AAA 對後半部分數據進行遞迴運算，輸入大小為 ⌈\lceil⌈n/2n/2n/2⌉\rceil⌉
呼叫BBB，其運算步驟數為 n\sqrt{n}n​
3.3.3. 返回結果。

令ana_nan​ 表示程序AAA 處理輸入大小為nnn 所需的步驟數：
1.1.1. 當 n≤2n \leq 2n≤2 時：
　　ana_nan​ === ccc, c是一個常數c是一個常數c是一個常數

222. 當 (n> 2) 時：
總步驟數為：

an=a⌊n/2⌋+a⌈n/2⌉+na_n = a_{\lfloor n/2 \rfloor} + a_{\lceil n/2 \rceil} +\sqrt{n} an​=a⌊n/2⌋​+a⌈n/2⌉​+n​

# b) Also estimate the complexity order ( O(...) ) of procedure A.

# $solution:

an=2an/2+n.a_n = 2a_{n/2} + \sqrt{n}. an​=2an/2​+n​.

T(n)=aT(nb)+O(nd)T(n) = aT\left(\frac{n}{b}\right) + O(n^d) T(n)=aT(bn​)+O(nd)

ininin thisthisthis casecasecase：
a = 222，b = 222, d = 12.\dfrac{1}{2}.21​.

ByByBy MasterMasterMaster Theorem,Theorem,Theorem,
2≥212,2\ge2^{\dfrac{1}{2}},2≥221​, ComplexityComplexityComplexity === O(nlogba)=O(n).O(n^{log_ba})=O(n).O(nlogb​a)=O(n).

# 6. Suppose a chess king is placed on the lower left square of an m×n chessboard. Let M(m, n) be the number of paths that a king can move from the lower left corner to the upper right corner of an m×n board, with the restriction that each move is either up, to the right, or diagonally up and to the right.

# (a) Find a recurrence relation and initial condition(s) for M(m, n)

# solution:solution:solution:

假設現在國王在棋盤上的一個格子(i,j)(i,j)(i,j)，前一個格子有可能是：

(i,j−1),(i−1,j),(i−1,j−1)(i,j−1), (i−1,j) , (i−1,j−1) (i,j−1),(i−1,j),(i−1,j−1)

# 三種可能性，因此 $$M (i,j)=M (i,j−1)+M (i−1,j)+M (i−1,j−1)$$

# 當當當 i=1i=1i=1 或 j=1j=1j=1，即棋盤在邊界上時，只有一條路徑可以到達那個位置：

# MMM(i,1)=1(i,1)=1(i,1)=1,M(1,j)=1,,M(1,j)=1,,M(1,j)=1, forforfor allallall i,j≥1i,j≥1i,j≥1

# 左下角為起點(1,1)只有一條路徑：左下角為起點(1,1)只有一條路徑：左下角為起點(1,1)只有一條路徑：M(1,1)=1M(1,1)=1M(1,1)=1

# (b) Find the number of ways in which the king can move from the lower left square to the upper right square on a 3×5 chessboard.

# solution:solution:solution:

M(i,j)=M(i,j−1)+M(i−1,j)+M(i−1,j−1)M(i,j)=M(i,j−1)+M(i−1,j)+M(i−1,j−1)M(i,j)=M(i,j−1)+M(i−1,j)+M(i−1,j−1)
M(i,1)=1,M(1,j)=1,M(i,1)=1,M(1,j)=1,M(i,1)=1,M(1,j)=1, forforfor allallall  i,j≥1i,j≥1i,j≥1

# 2022

# 1. For n ∈\in∈ Z+\mathbb{Z^+}Z+, in (1+x+x2)(1+x)n(1 + x + x ^ 2)(1 + x)^n(1+x+x2)(1+x)n , find the coefficient of xr,0≤r≤n+2.x^r,0\le r \le n+2.xr,0≤r≤n+2.

# solutions:solutions:solutions: (1+x+x2)(1+x)n=(1 + x + x ^ 2)(1 + x)^n=(1+x+x2)(1+x)n= (1+x+x2)⋅∑k=0n(nk)(1 + x + x ^ 2)\cdot \sum_{k=0}^{n}\left(\begin{array}{cc}n\\k\\\end{array}\right)(1+x+x2)⋅∑k=0n​(nk​)(x)k=1⋅∑k=0n(nk)(x)k+x⋅∑k=0n(nk)(x)k+x2⋅∑k=0n(nk)(x)k=(x)^k=1\cdot \sum_{k=0}^{n}\left(\begin{array}{cc}n\\k\\\end{array}\right)(x)^k + x\cdot \sum_{k=0}^{n}\left(\begin{array}{cc}n\\k\\\end{array}\right)(x)^k+x^2\cdot \sum_{k=0}^{n}\left(\begin{array}{cc}n\\k\\\end{array}\right)(x)^k=(x)k=1⋅∑k=0n​(nk​)(x)k+x⋅∑k=0n​(nk​)(x)k+x2⋅∑k=0n​(nk​)(x)k= ∑k=0n(nk)(x)k+∑k=0n(nk)(x)k+1+∑k=0n(nk)(x)k+2.\sum_{k=0}^{n}\left(\begin{array}{cc}n\\k\\\end{array}\right)(x)^k +\sum_{k=0}^{n}\left(\begin{array}{cc}n\\k\\\end{array}\right)(x)^{k+1}+\sum_{k=0}^{n}\left(\begin{array}{cc}n\\k\\\end{array}\right)(x)^{k+2}.∑k=0n​(nk​)(x)k+∑k=0n​(nk​)(x)k+1+∑k=0n​(nk​)(x)k+2. LetLetLet ara_rar​ isisis thethethe thethethe coefficientcoefficientcoefficient ofofof xr.x^r.xr. SoSoSo ar=(nr)+(nr−1)+(nr−2).a_r=\dbinom{n}{r}+\dbinom{n}{r-1}+\dbinom{n}{r-2}.ar​=(rn​)+(r−1n​)+(r−2n​).

# Note:Note:Note: (x+y)r(x + y)^{r}(x+y)r=== ∑k=0r(rk)\sum_{k=0}^{r}\left(\begin{array}{cc}r\\k\\\end{array}\right)∑k=0r​(rk​)(x)k(x)^k(x)k(y)r−k(y)^{r-k}(y)r−k

# WeWeWe can′tcan'tcan′t letletlet (1+x+x2)(1+x)n=(1+x)n+2.(1 + x + x ^ 2)(1 + x)^n=(1+x)^{n+2}.(1+x+x2)(1+x)n=(1+x)n+2.

# 2. Consider the following recursive procedure A. We will use the following assumptions: Suppose A and B are both procedures. B take #2m2m2m steps to compute, where m is the size of input.

# Procedure A(A(A(i1,i_1,i1​,i2,...,ini_2,...,i_ni2​,...,in​)))

# 1.if (n<=4)(n<=4)(n<=4) exit;

# 2.else {A(i1,i2,...,i⌊n/4⌋);\{A(i_1, i_2,...,i_{⌊n/4⌋});{A(i1​,i2​,...,i⌊n/4⌋​);

# 3.    A(i⌈3n/4⌉,i⌈3n/4⌉+1,...,in);A(i_{⌈3n/4⌉},i_{⌈3n/4⌉+1},...,i_n);A(i⌈3n/4⌉​,i⌈3n/4⌉+1​,...,in​);

# 4.   call B(B(B(i1,i_1,i1​,i2,...,ini_2,...,i_ni2​,...,in​)})\})}

# 5.return

# a) Derive recurrence relation to define the number of steps that procedure A takes to compute. Use an to denote # of steps when input size is n.

# solution:solution:solution:

我們要分析遞迴程序 AAA 的步驟數，並推導出該程序的時間複雜度。程序描述如下：

1.1.1. 當輸入大小 n≤4n\le 4n≤4 時，直接輸出結果並返回，步驟數為常數
2.2.2. 當 n>4n > 4n>4 時：
呼叫AAA 對前半部分數據進行遞迴運算，輸入大小為 ⌊\lfloor⌊n/4n/4n/4⌋\rfloor⌋
呼叫AAA 對後半部分數據進行遞迴運算，輸入大小為 ⌈\lceil⌈3n/43n/43n/4⌉\rceil⌉
呼叫BBB，其運算步驟數為 2n2n2n
3.3.3. 返回結果。

令ana_nan​ 表示程序AAA 處理輸入大小為nnn 所需的步驟數：
1.1.1. 當 n≤4n \leq 4n≤4 時：
